subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen proclaimeth: There is none other God but Me, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Bear thou witness unto that which God Himself hath testified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان القلم الاعلی ینطق انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم ان اشهد بما شهد الله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @suffering and imprisonment
